# volcenginecc_vke_kubeconfig (Resource)

Cluster Management Kubeconfig

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "volcenginecc_vke_kubeconfig" "VKEKubeconfigDemo" {
  cluster_id     = "cd****"
  type           = "Private"
  valid_duration = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) Cluster ID
- `type` (String) Cluster Kubeconfig File Type

### Optional

- `valid_duration` (Number) Kubeconfig File Validity Period

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Kubeconfig Creation Time
- `expire_time` (String) Kubeconfig Expiration Time
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `kubeconfig` (String) Kubeconfig Text
- `kubeconfig_id` (String) KubeconfigID。
- `role_id` (Number) Role ID
- `user_id` (Number) User ID

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import volcenginecc_vke_kubeconfig.example "cluster_id|kubeconfig_id"
```
